# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
- name: vmNamePrefix
  type: string
  default: 'dev'
  
resources:
- name: networkSecurityGroupRuleRDP
  type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups@2019-07-01
  properties:
    securityRules:
      - name: rdpRule
        protocol: tcp
        sourceAddressPrefixes:
          - '0.0.0.0/0'
        destinationPortRange: 3389
        access: Allow
-name: networkSecurityGroupRuleSSH
  type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups@2019-07-01  
  properties:
    securityRules:    
      - name : sshrule      
          protocol : tcp        
          sourceAddressPrefixes : ['0.0.0.0/0']          
          destinationPortRange : 22            
          access : Allow       
-name: networkSecurityGroupRuleHTTP  
  type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups@2019-07-01   
  properties:    
      securityRules:[      
            - name : httprule        
              protocol : tcp          
              sourceAddressPrefixes : ['0.0.0.0/0']            
              destinationPortRange : 80              
              access : Allow       
-name: networkSecurityGroupRuleHTTPS  
    type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups@2019-07-01    
      properties:[       - name : httpsrule         protocol : tcp           sourceAddressPrefixes : ['0.0.0.0/0']             destinationPortRange : 443               access : Allow        ]   }]}}}}}`
